description_long: This object is a halved kiwi fruit, displaying a rough, tan-brown outer skin with a fibrous, textured surface. The cut surface reveals a pale green, juicy interior with a lighter central core and a ring of small, dark brown seeds radiating outward. The skin appears thick and slightly uneven, with a matte, almost fuzzy finish. The interior flesh is moist and translucent, contrasting with the dry, rugged exterior. The overall shape is a slightly flattened hemisphere, with the cut side forming a clean, flat plane. The kiwi's natural coloration and texture are highly realistic, making it visually distinct and recognizable.
description: A halved kiwi fruit with a rough, tan-brown skin and a moist, pale green interior dotted with small dark seeds.
description_view_0: The cut surface of the kiwi is fully visible, showing the central core and radiating seeds, with the rough skin forming a thick border.
description_view_1: The kiwi is seen at an angle, highlighting the textured skin and a partial view of the green interior.
description_view_2: A direct view of the cut face, emphasizing the circular seed pattern and the evenness of the cut.
description_view_3: The kiwi is rotated to show more of the skin's texture and a slightly oblique view of the interior.
attribute_feather_pattern: No feathers are present; the surface is covered in a rough, fibrous skin with a tan-brown coloration and irregular texture. The interior is smooth and moist, with a radial pattern of small, dark seeds embedded in pale green flesh.
attribute_beak_shape: No beak is visible; the object is a halved fruit with a flat, cut surface and no protruding anatomical features.
attribute_eye_placement: No eyes are present; the object is a fruit and lacks any cranial or facial features.
attribute_walking_posture: Not applicable; the object is a fruit and does not exhibit any posture or locomotive traits.
